criteria.name: AI Music Generation Capability
criteria.description: The app's ability to generate original music from various inputs like text prompts, melodies, or selected styles.

criteria.name: Customization Options
criteria.description: The extent to which users can customize the generated music, including genre selection, tempo adjustment, key changes, and instrument choices.

criteria.name: User Friendliness
criteria.description: Ease of use for both beginners and experienced musicians.

criteria.name: Learning and Practice Features
criteria.description: Availability of AI-powered features for music education, such as real-time feedback, personalized lessons, and instrument separation.

criteria.name: Collaboration and Sharing
criteria.description: Features that allow users to collaborate with others and share their creations on social media or other platforms.
